title: Getting Started with GitHub Copilot
description: A practical guide to setting up GitHub Copilot.

sections.title: Getting a GitHub Copilot License
sections.content:
Before you can use GitHub Copilot, you need an active subscription.

### Free Tier

GitHub offers a **free tier** of GitHub Copilot.

sections.title: Installing Visual Studio Code
sections.content:
Visual Studio Code is the recommended editor for GitHub Copilot.

### Why VS Code?

- First-class Copilot support
- Built-in Copilot Chat

sections.title: Writing Effective Prompts
sections.content:
How you phrase your request to Copilot impacts the quality of what you get back.

### Be Specific

Vague prompts produce vague results.
